content:
(Sorry for Using Google Translate)

Hello, I'm a newbie who recently started playing this game in Japan. I really love it. I seem to have posted in the wrong place, so I'm reposting here.

Please open automatically without needing to step on the tile, if i pick up a key during exploration. Unlike tunnels or warp points, locked areas only have one option: open them. It's a bit of a hassle to keep selecting “Yes” every time it asks “Open?” lol.

It's not a big deal at all, but I'd appreciate it if you could consider a better approach.<:pray:1356053116260454534>
